explanation: some 用于肯定句，疑问句和否定句改用 any；milk 不可数，问数量用 How much。

answers: There is some milk in the bottle.
There's some milk in the bottle.

steps.prompt: 改为一般疑问句（注意 some 的变化）
answers: Is there any milk in the bottle?
There is not any milk in the bottle.
There isn't any milk in the bottle.
There is no milk in the bottle.
There's no milk in the bottle.
How much milk is there in the bottle?

explanation: 比较级句转换只动 be；"谁更高"用 Who is taller, A or B?（选择疑问）。

answers: Tom is taller than Jim.
Is Tom taller than Jim?
Tom is not taller than Jim.
Tom isn't taller than Jim.

steps.prompt: 对「Tom」提问（问"谁更高"，用选择疑问）
answers: Who is taller, Tom or Jim?
Who's taller, Tom or Jim?

explanation: 对时刻提问用 What time（或 When）；三单疑问/否定借助 does，get up 还原原形。

answers: He gets up at seven every day.
He gets up at seven o'clock every day.
Does he get up at seven every day?
Does he get up at seven o'clock every day?
He does not get up at seven every day.
He doesn't get up at seven every day.
He does not get up at seven o'clock every day.
He doesn't get up at seven o'clock every day.
What time does he get up every day?
When does he get up every day?

explanation: will 转换不借助 do：疑问句 will 提前，否定句 will not（won't）；问地点 Where，问时间 When。

answers: They will go to Beijing next week.
They'll go to Beijing next week.
Will they go to Beijing next week?
They will not go to Beijing next week.
They won't go to Beijing next week.
Where will they go next week?
When will they go to Beijing?
